phase_5_history_registry.purpose: Immutable record of Phase 5 raw cohort verdict + remediation per Directive Phase 5R §4

raw_cohort.defect_description: Source adapter set Scale.MILLION for raw VND values from vnstock. vnstock returns VND UNIT values. unit_currency_engine multiplied × 1M → EBITDA 4.96e18 instead of 4.96e12. Implied price 25.8 billion VND/share instead of 25,843 VND.

remediation.component: SOURCE_ADAPTER (Phase 5 new — NOT in Phase 4 frozen implementation)
remediation.root_cause: Scale.MILLION default for raw VND values from vnstock API. vnstock returns values already in VND UNIT (e.g., FPT EBITDA = 4.96e12 VND raw). When unit_currency_engine normalizes Scale.MILLION → UNIT, it multiplies × 1M, producing 4.96e18 (one million times truth).
remediation.fix: Changed _metric default scale from Scale.MILLION to Scale.UNIT in vnstock_adapter.py line ~52.
remediation.note_on_reconstruction: Pre-fix adapter reconstructed from post-fix by reverting Scale.UNIT → Scale.MILLION substitution (single line). Saved to halt dir for hash verification.

verdict_separation_principle.principle: Phase 5 raw cohort verdict is FAIL_SCALE_DEFECT — immutable per Directive Phase 5R §9.
verdict_separation_principle.prohibition: Cannot pool pre-patch and post-patch runs. Cannot change raw verdict to PASS.
verdict_separation_principle.phase5R_purpose: Establish a CLEAN fresh requalification cohort after a NEW freeze with patched adapter.
